signals.reasoning: BTC is already deep into a liquidation-flush state, so I would not chase a fresh short after the initial dump.
ETH is also already flushing and does not offer a clean new edge in either direction right here.
SOL is already in flush territory, so I would rather wait for a clearer reset than force a late trade.
0G is the only real long candidate because funding is still deeply negative while price remains strong, but the move is already extended and liquidity is poor, so confidence stays capped.
GOAT is already down hard and too illiquid to trust for a fresh short chase.
2Z has some squeeze fuel from negative funding, but liquidity is too poor and the setup is too unstable to force a fresh long.
MON remains a modest short lean because it is still weak and funding is still positive, which keeps the downside pressure intact.
GRASS is too low-liquidity and too mixed structurally to justify a fresh directional trade.
HEMI remains the clearest short on this board because price is weak while funding is still strongly positive, which leaves the long side crowded.
LIT is already down hard and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
DASH is already deeply flushed and I would rather wait than chase a fresh short here.
